title: schoenus biglumis
intro: Schoenus biglumis, also known as Big-rush or Big Rush Sedge, is a type of perennial plant that belongs to the sedge family. Traditionally, the plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Schoenus biglumis include its ability to aid in the treatment of various health conditions, such as respiratory issues, wounds, and skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Schoenus biglumis can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and salves, often used in traditional medicine practices.
